name: Cassowar
description: Light and nimble, the twin blades of this polearm will swoop and slice through throngs of hardened foes.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Light and nimble, the twin blades of this polearm will swoop and slice through throngs of hardened foes.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.4.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Cassowar not awarding any Clan Affinity. It now awards 3000 Clan Affinity! For those that have already Research the Cassowar, your Clan Affinity will be retroactively awarded by opening the Clan screen or entering the Dojo.
Fixed being able to use Guandao Rivens on the Cassowar.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.4.0
patchlogs.changes: *Baza and Cassowar Blueprints can be researched in your Clan Dojo’s Tenno Lab.
